allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: M2-001 is pushed. This scope implements M2-002 teacher packet preview/approve route-service-schema, deterministic PII masking helper, focused security tests, and the minimal desktop preview surface aligned with v6 mockup workflow.
warnings: Focused teacher packet pytest emits existing FastAPI ORJSONResponse deprecation warnings; behavior passes and cleanup should be separately scoped.
Focused teacher packet pytest took 81.69s because tests prepare isolated SQLite migrations and ASGI clients.
Desktop E2E requires local server binding and was run with sandbox escalation.

phase_notes.build: Implemented TeacherPacket schemas, service, route, PII helper, focused security tests, and desktop preview flow.
phase_notes.check: All required M2-002 verification commands passed; import boundary check also passed with no violations.
phase_notes.done: M2-002 is verified and ready for explicit stage, commit, and push.
